channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Prince Estate Releases Unheard Version of ‘With This Tear’
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: Welcome to our show, where we dive into the latest music news. Today, we're talking about a previously unheard recording from the one and only Prince. Get ready to hear a unique take on a familiar song.
[Soft music plays in the background]
Host: The Prince Estate has just released "With This Tear," a song Prince originally wrote and recorded in 1991 at Paisley Park. But here's the interesting part: Prince gave this song to Celine Dion, who released her own version in 1992. Now, we get to hear Prince's original recording, featuring his signature piano and vocals.
[Clip of Prince's "With This Tear" plays]
Host: This newly released version has been updated with a fresh mix by Grammy-nominated producer Chris James. It's part of the Prince Estate's effort to share more of the artist's unreleased material with the world. And the timing is notable, as we approach the 10th anniversary of Prince's passing.
[Soft music continues]
Host: Prince was a prolific songwriter, not just for himself, but for other artists as well. He wrote songs for a wide range of performers, often creating new and unique compositions. "With This Tear" is just one example of his incredible talent and generosity as a songwriter.
[Clip of Celine Dion's "With This Tear" plays]
Host: This release comes after renewed interest in Prince's archive, with other rare recordings surfacing online. While we don't know what's coming next, it's clear that the Prince Estate is committed to sharing more of the artist's hidden gems with us.
[Outro music starts]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in. If you're a Prince fan, you won't want to miss this new release. "With This Tear" is now available, offering a fresh perspective on a classic song. We'll be back with more music news and updates soon.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
